$jsonSchema.description: Sale document from the glasses perspective, embedding a customer snapshot for quick access

glassesId.description: Reference to the glasses that were sold - required

customerId.description: Reference to the customer who purchased the glasses - required

customerSnapshot.description: Embedded customer data snapshot at time of sale for historical accuracy

name.description: Customer name at the time of purchase

email.description: Customer email at the time of purchase

employeeId.description: Reference to the employee who processed the sale - required

soldAt.description: Date and time when the sale was completed - required

totalPrice.description: Final price paid by the customer - required

paymentMethod.description: Payment method used by the customer (optional)
